channel.title: UK Political & Policy Jobs (General)
channel.description: Job listings for UK General roles, scraped by Pol-Intel.

item.title: Associate Professorship of the International Relations of the Global South
item.description: Salary:£57,986 to £77,366 per annum, plus substantial additional benefits including a College housing allowance of £11,798 per annum (2025-26 figure), plus other benefits.
